codeReview.summary: The reviewed handoff points to commit 5627432, but that commit only changes the entry surface and does not implement or verify the task/workspace/org/preferences migration. The migrated surfaces do exist in the current tree, but this feature report overstates what was reviewed and leaves the feature without a matching implementation diff to scrutinize.

issues.description: The handoff records commitId 5627432 for this feature, but `git show 5627432` is an entry-surface-only change (resume/--limit/range validation) and contains no task, workspace, org, or preferences modifications. That means the feature has no reviewable implementation diff tied to its claimed completion, so the scrutiny evidence does not support a pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked the feature complete based on current-tree inspection instead of tracing the actual implementation diff, even though the cli-worker skill requires checking the assigned feature against shared-state truth before claiming it is already implemented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session 5551fde5-b93c-4087-a1dc-39f83cf94fda shows only read/help/test commands and ends with commitId 5627432; no feature-specific code diff was identified, while .factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md step 8 says to inspect the actual diff/behavior before claiming a feature is already implemented.

summary: Fail: the supplied handoff/commit evidence does not correspond to the task/workspace/org/preferences migration, so this feature cannot be approved from the recorded implementation evidence.
